name: Metro Mining Limited
analysis: MMI's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.6200. Trade idea: entry A$1.6500, stop A$1.3860, target A$2.4420 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
